name: trackman-golf
description: Your Trackman Golf stats as MCP tools — handicap, rounds, practice, shot data, club gapping.
long_description: Connects to Trackman Golf with your own account and exposes your stats — course rounds, practice sessions, shot-level launch-monitor data, club gapping, and handicap — as MCP tools, so Claude can analyze your game and coach you. Runs locally; your data and token never leave your machine. To sign in, just tell Claude "log in to Trackman" — a browser window opens, you sign in once, done. No terminal, no token. Requires a Trackman account.

trackman_token.title: Trackman token (optional — leave blank)
trackman_token.description: Most people should leave this blank: after installing, just tell Claude "log in to Trackman" and a browser window opens to sign in. This field is only for advanced users who'd rather paste a Bearer token captured from an authenticated Trackman portal session.
